pi_items.source: Task description states 'You are a graphic designer retouching a portrait'; README.md states 'Occupation: Graphic Designers'
Task description mentions 'client's annual report' and 'suitable for print publication'; README.md states 'Industry: Graphic Design / Print Media'
Task description explicitly states 'export the final retouched image as retouched_portrait.png to your Desktop'; verifier.py checks for this file at /home/ga/Desktop/retouched_portrait.png
Task description: 'tonal range is compressed and needs stretching to recover full contrast'; README lists 'Tonal range correction' as first correction
Task description: 'image has an undesirable color cast that needs correction'; README lists 'Color cast removal' as second correction
Task description: 'mid-tones need selective sharpening to recover detail lost during scanning'; README lists 'Selective sharpening' as third correction
Task description: 'client requests a subtle darkened vignette around the edges'; README lists 'Edge vignette' as fourth correction

pi_items.verified_value: Abraham Lincoln O-77 matte collodion print portrait from Wikimedia Commons
pi_items.source: setup_task.sh downloads from https://commons.wikimedia.org/wiki/Special:FilePath/Abraham_Lincoln_O-77_matte_collodion_print.jpg; verified as real 2200x2835 JPEG image

pi_items.verified_value: Compressed contrast range (197 out of 255), grayscale/neutral color balance, historical photographic quality
pi_items.source: Direct image analysis: p5=30, p95=227, RGB channels all ~120; consistent with task description of 'compressed tonal range' requiring stretching

pi_items.verified_value: Yes - real public domain images from Wikimedia Commons and Unsplash
pi_items.source: Verified downloads of Abraham Lincoln portrait (Wikimedia), Thomas Edison portrait (Wikimedia), and Unsplash portrait image; all are real, publicly available photographs

privileged_info_summary: The task requires a graphic designer to perform professional portrait retouching with four specific corrections: tonal range expansion, color cast correction, selective sharpening, and vignette addition. The output must be saved as retouched_portrait.png on the Desktop. The source image is a real, public domain Abraham Lincoln O-77 matte collodion print portrait from Wikimedia Commons (2200x2835 pixels) with naturally compressed contrast range (197 out of 255) and neutral grayscale appearance. Fallback sources include real historical portraits of Thomas Edison and Albert Einstein from Wikimedia Commons, plus a modern portrait from Unsplash. The task industry context is Graphic Design/Print Media (annual report preparation), and the occupation is Graphic Designers.
